entity.name: Zackery Sayers / TaterLabs
entity.description: Independent developer building TaterTOS64v3, a fully independent 64-bit operating system written from scratch. Every subsystem — kernel, device drivers, TCP/IP stack, TLS, web browser with JavaScript, custom filesystem, GUI compositor — is original code with no Linux or Windows source. Built in ~10 weeks by one person on a $140 refurbished Dell Precision 7530. Also builds Legacy Indie Radio (AI-powered radio station) and published embodied LLM research on Zenodo.

projects.name: TaterTOS64v3
projects.description: A ground-up open-source 64-bit operating system for digital sovereignty. Includes: custom kernel with ACPI 6.2 AML interpreter, NVMe/WiFi 802.11ac/HD Audio/USB 3.0 drivers, TCP/IP networking with TLS 1.3, ToTFS custom filesystem, TaterSurf web browser (HTML5/CSS3/JS/video/audio), GUI compositor with TaterWin IPC, custom libc and .fry binary format. 2.3 million lines, 1,112 files. Boots on bare metal Dell Precision 7530 and QEMU. GPL v3.
